docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT WOOLSEY, CHRISTOPHER HEARING SET FOR SEP-21-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER FOR EXAMINATION (FEE: $75.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEDDLE, SARAH SERVED JUL-31-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOOLSEY, CHRISTOPHER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEDDLE, SARAH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,470.00 FILED BY WEDDLE, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT WOOLSEY, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED APR-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOOLSEY, CHRISTOPHER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEDDLE, SARAH

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2015 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-11-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DETOR PROMISES TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE; FURTHERMORE DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY CREDITOR PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY ADAM GURLEY--ATTORNEY (FRIEND). DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 9/21/15 IS WITHDRAWN. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT,CHRISTOPHER WOOLSEY. NO APPEARANCE BY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. APPEARANCE BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN AND S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEDDLE, SARAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOOLSEY, CHRISTOPHER $1,470.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,555.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2015 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-19-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM KNOX-DAVIES---FRIEND. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS DISCHARGE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - WEDDLE,SARAH;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
